chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1337 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 07.04.2025. Mr. Badal Gahoti advocate for Applicant/Accused. Agha Abdul Nabi Special Prosecutor ANF. -.-. MIRAN MUHAMMAD SHAH, J.- Learned Special Prosecutor ANF states that he shall conclude the trial within one month and since the accused possesses his criminal record no enmity has been produced whereas he has unexplained absconsion of one year and his offence falls within the prohibitory clause and the bail application may be rejected. However, Counsel for the applicant/accused states otherwise and says that the trial has been delayed on part of the prosecution and there is no recovery as such from the accused as he has been shown to have run away from the spot and entire recovery has been foisted upon him. However, the evidence so far produced denies the contentions of the Counsel for the applicant/accused. In such circumstances, instant application is declined. However, ANF is directed to conclude the trial within one month. After one month if the trial has not been concluded the applicant/accused shall be at liberty to approach the learned Trial Court again for bail. JUDGE Ali Haider
